title: The Art Heist Mastermind Who Vanished
title_full: The Art Heist Mastermind Who Vanished #Shorts #facts #didyouknow #true crime
description:
What would you steal?

In 1990, a daring heist saw 13 priceless artworks vanish from a Boston museum. The thieves, disguised as police, escaped with over $500 million worth of art, and have never been seen since. Their identities remain a mystery to this day. Follow for more!
